Phase 9 Pre-LLM MVP. Sprint 1 DONE (grandma UX, spec upgrades, example quality). Sprint 2 DONE (image upload, save/load, hex colors, SEO, brand). Sprints 3-5 remain. 54/54 Playwright tests. TypeScript clean. Dev server on localhost:5173. Next: Sprint 3 (section variant completeness + pricing variants).

User grounding reorders remaining sprints vs README.md: Sprint 2 (section variants + pricing) is next per user, Sprint 3 (quality pass with type fixes + 70 tests), Sprint 4 (docs + review), Sprint 5 (manual gates requiring human). Follow user grounding order, not README sprint numbers.

AISP 5.1 Platinum: math-first neural symbolic protocol by Bradley Ross. 512 symbols across 8 categories (Ω:Transmuters, Γ:Topologics, ∀:Quantifiers, Δ:Contractors, 𝔻:Domaines, Ψ:Intents, ⟦⟧:Delimiters, ∅:Reserved). Category Theory + Natural Deduction. Ambig(D)<0.02. Pocket architecture (Header+Membrane+Nucleus). Hebbian learning. Quality tiers ◊⁺⁺/◊⁺/◊/◊⁻/⊘. Used for AI-to-AI zero-trust communication and spec generation in Hey Bradley.

Hey Bradley: JSON-driven spec platform. Pipeline: Ideation → Hey Bradley → Specs + JSON → Claude Code → Production Site. Stack: Vite + React 18 + TS + Tailwind + shadcn/ui + Zustand + Zod. 12 themes, 10 examples, 258+ images, 6 spec generators (North Star, SADD, Build Plan, Features, Human Spec, AISP). Warm cream chrome (#faf8f5). Phase 11 CLOSED, Phase 12 next.
